backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three main features: replacing teddy bears with kawaii bear characters, updating the interactive question sequence with 5 specific questions and reactions, and creating an animated giftcards section with 6 pastel-colored cards.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated summaries of all frontend component files describing the animation orchestration, 3D canvas rendering, interactive questions, bear reactions, and various animation scenes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with romantic pink and lavender color schemes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Birthday Wish Animation app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering AnimationOrchestrator with a fixed full-screen gradient background in pink and lavender tones.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedCanvas.t: React Three Fiber canvas component rendering 3D background with floating hearts, sparkles, balloons, flowers, and multiple kawaii teddy bears (white and brown variants) with cinematic lighting.
frontend/src/components/AnimationOrchest: Main orchestrator component managing scene transitions through 11 sequential scenes: glitter text, questions, countdown, polaroids, love notes, cake, giftcards, flower bouquet, personal photo, heart explosion, and final messages.
frontend/src/components/BearReaction.tsx: Component displaying animated kawaii bear reactions (hearts, blush, spin, laugh, hug) with corresponding images and messages, auto-dismissing after 2.5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/BloomingFlower.t: Three.js component rendering a flower with blooming scale animation and gentle floating/rotation motion using a flower bouquet texture.
frontend/src/components/BokehLights.tsx: Three.js particle system creating 50 soft bokeh light effects with pastel colors, gentle floating motion, and additive blending.
frontend/src/components/CakeCandleAnimat: Birthday cake animation component with lit candles that blow out after 3 seconds, showing flickering flames and smoke particles.
frontend/src/components/CinematicLightin: Three.js lighting setup with ambient, directional, point, and spot lights configured in romantic pink and lavender OKLCH colors.
frontend/src/components/CountdownAnimati: Displays an animated countdown from 15 to 18 with bounce effects and a birthday message when reaching 18.
frontend/src/components/FinalMessages.ts: Shows two staggered romantic messages with fade-in animations: 'You are my safest place' and 'Forever yours'.
A Three.js 3D balloon component that floats upward with sinusoidal horizontal movement and resets when reaching the top.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHeart.ts: A Three.js 3D heart shape with extruded geometry that floats and rotates using sinusoidal animations.
frontend/src/components/FlowerBouquetFin: Animated sequence showing a gift box opening to reveal a flower bouquet with a bear, floating petals, and a Hindi message.
frontend/src/components/GiftcardsSection: Displays a grid of six gift cards with staggered reveal animations, including special cards like 'Unlimited hugs' and 'Tikli Master'.
frontend/src/components/GlitterText.tsx: Shows a large 'Happy 18th Birthday My Love' heading with glitter effects and floating animation.
frontend/src/components/HeartExplosion.t: Creates an explosion effect of 50 heart emoji particles radiating outward from the center with randomized animations.
frontend/src/components/LoveNotes.tsx: Displays four romantic notes in a grid layout with staggered fade-in and scale animations on decorative paper backgrounds.
frontend/src/components/PersonalPhotoEnd: Shows a personal photo with romantic frame borders, floating hearts, sparkles, and the text 'tikla hain aap'.
frontend/src/components/PolaroidFrames.t: Displays four polaroid-style memory frames in a grid with staggered slide-in and rotation animations.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard.tsx: A reusable card component displaying a question with two button options, progress indicator, and answer animation.
frontend/src/components/QuestionSequence: Manages a sequence of 5 romantic questions with binary choice answers, triggering unique bear reaction animations (hearts, blush, spin, laugh, hug) after each answer and transitioning to completion callback.
frontend/src/components/SparkleParticles: Three.js particle system component that renders animated sparkles with pastel pink and lavender colors, floating and rotating in 3D space with additive blending.
frontend/src/components/TeddyBear.tsx: 3D plane mesh component displaying kawaii bear textures (white or brown variant) with floating and gentle rotation animations using Three.js.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder hook file indicating no backend queries are needed as all logic is client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom romantic pink and lavender color scheme in OKLCH format for both light and dark modes, plus kawaii-themed utility classes and Google Fonts imports.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme with romantic color variables, custom fonts (Pacifico, Dancing Script, Quicksand), and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining an Instagram-style romantic birthday animation with kawaii bears, detailed image requirements for bear reactions, gift cards, flowers, and photo frames in pastel pink/lavender theme.
